commit_message:
Fix Vivado syntax errors in vga_controller Fix Vivado syntax errors in vga_controller - Remove 'integer' keyword from parameter and localparam declarations
- Separate wire declarations from continuous assignments using assign statements
- Ensure Vivado-compatible syntax for all combinational logic

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Refactor**
  * Reorganized VGA controller module parameters and local constants to use untyp
